# Links chapter {#sec-links}

No linking between chapters, they are separate. Nor to equations outside this chapter.

## Section One

One way to include videos is to use the Quarto syntax used to insert any figures, where you write

```
::: {#fig-vid3}
{{﹤video https://youtu.be/d2nG7Y17sQw 
  title = "Binomial response models applied to beetle mortality data (9m59s)",
  <other customizations can be put here>
>}}

This is the caption.
:::
```

For more details: [Quarto video manual](https://quarto.org/docs/authoring/videos.html)

Here it is:

::: {#fig-vid3}
{{< video https://youtu.be/d2nG7Y17sQw 
  title = "Binomial response models applied to beetle mortality data (9m59s)"
>}}

This is the caption.
:::

Referencing is simple, like this @fig-vid3. Such video blocks must contain actual text (the caption is drawn from the final line).


## Section Two

Text here.
